use_codes.desc: ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY TO LIPID-LOWERING MEDICATIONS AND DIET TO REDUCE LOW DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN-CHOLESTEROL, APOLIPOPROTEIN B, TOTAL CHOLESTEROL, AND NON-HIGH DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL IN PTS WITH HOMOZYGOUS FAMILIAL HYPERCHOLESTEROLEMIA

indications.text:
KYNAMRO® is indicated as an adjunct to lipid-lowering medications and diet to reduce
low density lipoprotein-cholesterol (LDL-C), apolipoprotein B (apo B), total cholesterol
(TC), and non-high density lipoprotein-cholesterol (non-HDL-C) in patients with
homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia (HoFH...
